articles.title: Impeach court can force ex-sheriff punched by Sara Duterte to testify
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Senate as impeachment court can compel the court sheriff who was punched by Vice President Sara Duterte to testify, a member of the House prosecutorial team said on Monday. Atty. Mae Divinagracia made the remark after former Davao City court sheriff Abe Andres appeared to have begged off in his inclusion as witness in the upcoming impeachment trial of Duterte. In a Facebook post last week, Andres said “it is my position ever since to refuse to comment on the incident.” READ: Assaulted sheriff, VP aide, ‘Piattos’ among witnesses “Please do not involve me in any [...]...
